title: Steamed Monkfish with Soup Sauce
description: A flavorful and healthy dish that combines the delicate taste of monkfish with a savory soup sauce. Perfect for a light dinner option.
instructions: Season the monkfish fillets with salt and pepper.
Place the monkfish fillets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle crunchy breadcrumbs over the monkfish fillets.
Bake the monkfish in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, prepare the soup sauce by combining Saudia soup mix and steamy broth in a saucepan.
Bring the soup sauce to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove the monkfish from the oven and serve with the soup sauce spooned over the top.
